In the midst of what often feels like the most divided and volatile time in modern history -- find hope in this.

Nothing unites us like faith.


Townhall.com (@townhallcom)

BREAKING — For the first time in a decade, over HALF of GenZ Males AND Millennial Males are reading the bible weekly. 

Bible sales are SKYROCKETED in every single demographic in 2025.

Incredible.🙏

It’s amazing what can change in a year 🥹

Bringing my beautiful baby girl to the @WhiteHouse for Women’s History Month was a dream come true - thank you @POTUS and @FLOTUS for honoring motherhood so well! 🫶

Please help us meet our goal to save babies here in Washington, D.C. by providing free diapers to moms in need!

If you can spare $50 - you may just save a life.

Donate here 👇


EveryLife (@everylife)

🚨This is the last chance to help meet the urgent diaper need at Nana’s House.

Our diaper drive with @theisabelb and @LiveAction ENDS TONIGHT at midnight, and every bundle supports Nana’s House as they help moms choose life!

Nana’s House is still in critical need of diapers, and for many women,

Forgive my Christian ignorance but when was the last time a woman was BEATEN TO DEATH BY THE MORALITY POLICE for a sliver of her hair showing in a Christian country?


End Wokeness (@EndWokeness)

Joy Reid: America is a Christian form of Iran & women may have be better off there

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/EndWokeness/status/2033542969509191976#m
Also can we just talk about how truly iconic this look is???????

The symbolism of this moment is everything—at the peak of your career & receiving the applause of the most influential people on earth, the thing that really matters is your family.

“The capacity of a mother’s love” is infinitely more powerful than all the fame & glory the world has to offer.

Video

Liberals who have low attendance are the most likely to have a diagnosis.

I don’t know who needs to hear this but if you genuinely believe this you should probably quit your hormonal birth control


LinaHua (@Linahuaa)

Henry Cavill is more of a man's man.
He actually isn't THAT attractive to most women.
Timothy Chalamet outshines him as sex symbol that appears to women.

Henry has the classic strong, tall, muscular and reliable kind of vibe, but he lacks edginess, danger, mystery.

He's basically a Reddit nice guy in a jagged body and a handsome face. 
Also, he's ent

The end result of normalizing radical Islam in the West--today on the Isabel Brown Show 👇
piped.video/y18GNfDdW3A

You can't make this up -- the UK is debating BANNING 67 different dog breeds INCLUDING THE PEMBROKE WELSH CORGI, citing "unethical breeding standards."

Brits on social media have a different theory--are dogs being banned bc of the rise of Islam in the UK? 🤔🇬🇧

Thoughts? 👇

Video

Full reaction to Mamdani's refusal to cover terrorism for what it is and the media running interference for radical Islam today on the Isabel Brown Show 👇
piped.video/y18GNfDdW3A

The media is pulling a "Butler, PA" over the attempted terror attack in New York City last weekend, insinuating that the ISIS-inspired radical Islamic terrorists were instead "anti-Islam" Christian conservatives seeking to harm Zohran Mamdani.

You don't hate the media enough.

Video

A year ago this week, I headed to the White House for their Women’s History Month celebration nine months pregnant and in complete shock that casually heading to the White House was real life. This week, my daughter got her very own invitation to see the President and First Lady speak on National Working Moms day 🥰 it’s completely surreal that our day-to-day life here in DC involves toting our daughter around to the White House multiple times every month, and we are savoring every single second.
Ah yes, Sharia Law—the hallmark epitome of feminism
Court TV has nothing on the drama of the Ninth Circuit 🍿

Should Christians be forbidden to say “I love you” before marriage, sneak a kiss before the altar, or date before being given a father’s complete permission? 🧐 Full interview with Jinger Duggar Vuolo & Jeremy Vuolo dropping today! 🫶
Almost like identity in God helps ground you in reality 👀
Take this as your sign to quit your birth control YESTERDAY
Thank you, God, for answering my prayers 🥴

I will never forget standing outside of DC’s largest Planned Parenthood for the first time, seeing a stream of beautiful women be drug through the door to end the lives of their babies thinking it was their only option. Similarly, I will never forget the pit in my stomach I felt hearing on this phone call that DC’s abortionists will kill innocent babies up to nearly 32 weeks of pregnancy for virtually any reason, and schedule you for the procedure as soon as the very next day. Living in Washingt

I am a WOMAN. I am NOT a “lens through which to examine, interrogate, and defeat patriarchy.” NOR am I a person who menstruates, a chest feeder, a person with eggs, or any of the ridiculous demeaning labels these people insist on assigning us.
Why we stopped posting our daughter’s face online 👀 Beyond grateful for voices like @Tim Tebow standing up for the vulnerable when few others are.
